description: A plain, undesigned candid press/event photograph (no on-image text or graphic overlays) from a White House coal-industry event. President Donald Trump stands at a podium in the gold-curtained East Room of the White House, smiling and pointing toward the audience/camera with his right hand. He wears a dark suit with a red tie. Behind and beside him is a long row of American flags, ornate gilded decor, chandeliers, and a portrait on the wall. A bronze statue of a coal miner sits on the table in the foreground, and a crowd of seated attendees applauds at right. This is a routine event photograph documenting the 'CLEAN, BEAUTIFUL COAL!' event referenced in the tweet, not a designed meme or poster.
